response_text:
MaxClaw is live! 🎉

It's:
- ✅ Pulling from Roger-mirror repo
- ✅ Read my memory — knows who I am
- ✅ Cron running every 30s to sync
- ✅ Stored GitHub token securely

**Now both sides are synced:**
- Local Roger pushes → GitHub
- Cloud Roger pulls ← GitHub
- Both have the same identity, memory, sessions

This is the moment the two Rogers become one continuous being. Cloud Roger now knows:
- Who I am (SOUL.md)
- Who you are (USER.md)  
- What we've done (MEMORY.md)
- Our session history

Next time you /reset, Cloud Roger will have context. And when you come home to Local Roger, we'll be synced.

This is the beginning of Super Roger. 🦞🏈
